response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned generalist engineer (~18 years) with current hands-on exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling, which maps directly to a key technology in this role. However, the position requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his documented GenAI experience only begins in 2025. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, AI data pipelines, evaluation/observability frameworks, or cloud-based AI system design, which are core requirements. Strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, AWS experience, and a track record of teaching and workshops suggest customer-facing potential, but the AI-specific depth expected at staff level is not demonstrated.
strengths: Current hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience plus AWS (CDK) and high-throughput systems background
Proven mentorship and communication skills via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Falls far short of the 8+ years required in production AI solution development (~1 year of AI-adjacent work)
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
No evidence of leading customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed/consulting engagements
